cards.extracted_excerpt: Once I've done that change, I then add the new feature. Honor these fetched design canons when relevant:
- [daif] Cultural Bias and Cultural Alignment of Large Language Models: LLMs can overrepresent dominant cultural defaults, so culturally charged outputs need explicit plural witnesses.
- [daif] The Reversal Curse: Models trained on A-is-B facts may fail to infer B-is-A, so prompt scaffolds must not assume bidirectional recall.
- [daif] Google AI Principles: AI should be socially beneficial, avoid creating unfair bias, be built and tested for safety, and be accountable to people.
